"It's over 9000!"
"Hold your fire. This man isn't black."
"Prepare for trouble. And make it a double!"
"I want to live! Take me to the sea with you!"
"Could you perhaps, show me your panties?"
"Ok."
"Don’t believe in yourself! Believe in me! Believe in me who believes in you!"
"If you win, you live. If you lose, you die. If you don’t fight, you can’t win!"
"I am a god. You three are trash!"
"Am I sweating? No, it just rain. These fools can never make me sweat."
"Za Warudo!" ("The World")
"We can't be together. Not because you're a rabbit, but because you're black."
"The only ones who should kill are those who are prepared to be killed."
"If the king doesn't move, then his subjects won't follow."
"Omae wa mou shindeiru." ("You are already dead.")
question.answer: Hokuto no Ken (Fist of the North Star)

"How about a nice cup of Liber-tea!"
"It's high noon."
"Ah shit, here we go again."
"Get over here!"
"Kneel, peasants!"
"Hey cousin, let's go bowling!"
"Requiescat in pace."
"I used to be an adventurer like you, then I took an arrow in the knee."

question.text: "I don't want your damn lemons! What the hell am I suppose to do with these?"
"You call this resisting arrest? We call this a difficulty tweak."
"Fifty-thousand people used to live in this city, now it's a ghost town."
"Did I ever tell you what the definition of insanity is?"
"Would you kindly..."
"This is how it ends!"
"Scotland is not a real country, you are an Englishman with a dress!"
"Wake the fuck up Samurai. We got a city to burn."
"In the rear, with the gear."
"Dammit, Jack - how did you know stairs were my only weakness?"

"I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse."
"May the force be with you."
"I'll be back."
"You shall not pass!"
"With great power, comes with great responsibility."
"On your left."
"“You are without doubt the worst pirate I’ve ever heard of.”
"Wingardium Leviosa."
"Maximum effort."
"Vote for Pedro."
"You either die a hero or you live long enough to see yourself become the villain”
"I love the smell of napalm in the morning."
"English, motherfucker. Do you speak it?"
"As a child, I yearned for the mines."
"He may have been your father, boy. But he wasn't your daddy."
"Yes, it's true. This man has no dick."
"I'm walkin here!"

Who is the titular mother in "How I met your mother"?

Who was Sam's first kiss in "ICarly"?
What cancer was Walter White was diagnoised with in the "Breaking Bad"?
What was the first monster Eleven encountered in "Stranger Things"?

In "The Boys", which of the Seven was the first to die in the series?

Which country that hosted the Olympics the most?

"Float like a butterfly, sting like a bee."
Which NBA player that appeared in Looney Tunes' Space Jam movie?
Which country that won the most FIFA World Cups?
Which athlete that won the most Olympic gold medals?
Who is the highest paid athlete in the world?
Which two NFL teams that has the most Super Bowl wins?
question.answer: New England Patriots and Pittsburg Steelers

question.text: Which heavyweight champion boxer that faces off with Donnie Yen in Ip Man movie?
Which NFL player was the movie "The Blind Side" based on?

Who has the most career home runs in MLB history?

Which boxer who won quintuple championships with an undefeated record?
"To infinity and beyond!"
"Long live the king."
"Is mayonnaise an instrument?"
"Watch where you're goin', ya fool!"
question.answer: Di Lung, Courage the Cowardly Dog

question.text: "Shut up baby, I know it."
"Sufferin' succotash."
"It's too cliche. I won't say I'm in love."
"If the wind in my sail on the sea stays behind me, one day I'll know how far I'll go."
"You got a dark side, guess you're not the only one."
"Pride is not the opposite of shame, but rather its source."
"When we hit our lowest point, we are opened to the greatest change."
"No matter where I go, you will always be my mother."
"Not everyone can become a great artist, but a great artist can come from anywhere."
"Why, you set my soul on fire. It is not, just a little spark. It is a flame. A big roaring flame."
"No! You have a perfect civilization. Why you wanna add a woman to it?"
"No God, please no!"
"Brace yourselves, winter is coming."
"Delicious. Finally some good fucking food."
"Live long and prosper."
"Bazinga!"
"Suprise, motherfucker!"
"I am not in danger, I am the danger."
"How you doin'?"
"The truth is out there."
"Fishing relaxes me. It’s like yoga, except I still get to kill something.”
"The pain doesn't go away. You just make room for it."
"It's going to be legendary."
question.answer: Barney Stinson, How I Met Your Mother

question.text: "Her lips said 'No," but her eyes said 'read my lips.'"
"In this world, there are no sides. Only players"
"No cash, no credit, no job history. You're stuck in whatever city they decide to dump you in."
I wear a tuxedo but never to dine. I waddle and slide on snow so fine. What am I?
Largest and heaviest creature in the world
I sip on blood, I’m small but cruel, I rule the dusk when heat turns cool. What am I?
Smartest non-human creature
I steal from fields when nights are still, masked and nimble, sharp of will. What am I?
Strongest bite force in the world
I march in suits, no drums, no fame, a thousand hearts that beat the same. What am I?
Fastest creature in the world
My arms can taste, my head wears no crown, yet I rule reefs without making a sound. What am I?
Longest living vertebrate
